title: bupleurum ranunculoides var. genuinum
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides var. genuinum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Hare's ear, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving liver function, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Bupleurum ranunculoides var. genuinum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
